title: Tab And Locator Color
description: GUI-based Tab & Locator color sync for better player visibility
body:
TabAndLocatorColor

A Fabric server-side mod for Minecraft 26.1.x that enhances player visibility by adding customizable colors to the Locator Bar, Player List (Tab), Name Display, and Team Mode.

No client-side installation required.

Features

🎨 Player Color System

Players can choose their own personal color.

The selected color is applied to:

- Locator Bar
- Tab List
- Name Display Mode
- Team Mode

Supports:

- 16 Minecraft base colors
- Extended HEX color palette
- Color shade selection GUI

---

📋 Tab Display Modes

Three display modes are available:

SYMBOL

Displays a colored symbol before player names.

NAME

Displays player names using the selected color.

BOTH

Combines both Symbol and Name coloring.

Mode can be changed in the config.

---

📍 Locator Bar Coloring

Player markers in the Minecraft 26.1.x Locator Bar are displayed using the player's selected color.

Supports both HEX colors and Minecraft base colors.

---

📺 Player Status System

Players can display their current activity.

Available statuses:

- AFK
- Working
- Streaming

Status can be changed using commands or GUI.

Supports client language translations.

---

🖥 GUI Color Selection

Color selection GUI supports:

- Minecraft base colors
- HEX shade selection
- Status selection
- Team Mode compatible color selection

---

👥 Team Color Mode

Administrators can enable Team Mode.

Command:

/lc team true

When enabled:

- Player colors are converted to the nearest Minecraft team color
- Locator Bar colors are synchronized
- Tab colors are synchronized
- Name Tags are synchronized

Disable:

/lc team false

Player personal colors are automatically restored.

---

🎯 Automatic Team Assignment

Command:

/lc team set <teams>

Examples:

/lc team set 2
/lc team set 3
/lc team set 4

Features:

- Random team assignment
- Balanced team sizes
- Fixed recognizable team colors

Color order:

1. Red
2. Blue
3. Yellow
4. Green
5. Purple
6. Pink
7. Aqua
8. Orange

Team sizes are distributed fairly and randomly.

---

🌍 Multi-Language Support

Supports:

- English
- Japanese
- German
- French
- Spanish
- Portuguese
- Italian
- Korean
- Chinese (Simplified)
- Chinese (Traditional)

Player status text automatically follows the viewer's language settings.

---

⚡ Commands

Main Commands:

/locatorcolor
/lc
/talc

Examples:

/lc gui
/lc team true
/lc team false
/lc team set 3

Tab completion supported.

---

🔧 Configuration

Configurable options:

- Duplicate color behavior
- Tab display mode
- Status text overrides
- Color settings
- Team Mode options

---

📦 Server-Side Only

Players do not need to install this mod.

Only the server requires TabAndLocatorColor.
